case_title: FULLER, RAY CHARLES VS THE INDEPENDENT

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FULLER, RAY CHARLES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE INDEPENDENT IMPROPER SERVICE WAIVED BY DEFENDNAT. PLAINTIFF DID NOT SUSTAIN HIS BURDEN OF PROOF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT THE INDEPENDENT RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT FULLER, RAY CHARLES $861.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,061.00, IMPROPER SERVICE WIVED BY PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
